summary: codex-run-failed: Verify with `/codex:setup` and `--selftest`. The review target must be a git repo with the reviewed content present. The required release-review engine could not write its job log because the environment is read-only, so no trustworthy code-review verdict was produced.
next_steps: Rerun the release review in an environment that permits writing the Codex plugin job log and `docs/reviews/template-hardening/release-r1.json`.
